channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 2 Minute Medicine Rewind May 25, 2026
item.description: Validation of two syncope risk scores and comparison with physician risk estimation.

item.title: Reshaping Pancreatic Cancer Treatment: Inside KRAS
item.description: Two KRAS-targeted strategies are reshaping treatment for metastatic pancreatic cancer after decades of limited progress.

item.title: Is baby talk bad? Why 'parentese' actually helps babies learn language
item.description: Many parents are warned against baby talk, but 'parentese' may actually support language development in infants.

item.title: Suspected Ebola cases top 900 in DR Congo: WHO chief
item.description: More than 900 suspected Ebola cases have been reported in conflict-hit Democratic Republic of Congo, according to the WHO.
